forecastPage.title: Seasonal Forecast
forecastPage.description: Select a region and season to generate a probabilistic rainfall forecast.

validationPage.title: Model Validation
validationPage.description: Rolling-origin Heidke Skill Scores and release tier assignments for all 13 regions.

forecast.selectPrompt: Select a region and season, then click Generate Forecast
forecast.selectZonePrompt: Select a zone, then click Generate Forecast
forecast.errorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred while fetching the forecast.
forecast.errorZoneGeneric: An unexpected error occurred while fetching the zone forecast.
forecast.zonePricesNote: Region-level data — zone prices not available

advisory.title: Advisory
advisory.experimentalAction: Treat recommendations as indicative only and verify with local agricultural extension officers and official sources before acting.

tier.experimentalPost: ) is positive but below the validated threshold (≥ 0.10). Use with caution.
tier.suppressedPre: This region-season has no positive prospective skill (RO-HSS:

suppressed.heading: No Validated Forecast
suppressed.explanationPre: This region-season combination has no positive prospective skill (Rolling-Origin HSS:
suppressed.explanationPost: ). Displaying a forecast would misrepresent model reliability. Climatological probabilities apply (≈33% each class).

validation.sectionDescription: Rolling-origin out-of-sample skill scores by region and season.
validation.hssNote: — Rolling-origin is the prospective estimate; LOOCV tends to be inflated.

landing.heroTagline: Probabilistic seasonal rainfall forecasts for Ethiopia
landing.heroDescription: Azmera issues above-/near-/below-normal tercile outlooks for Ethiopia's 13 administrative regions using SST-based logistic regression trained on CHIRPS satellite data and validated over 27 years of rolling-origin hindcasts. Every forecast carries an explicit skill tier so meteorologists always know how much confidence the model warrants.
landing.feature1Body: Independent logistic regression models for all 13 Ethiopian administrative regions, each trained on region-specific CHIRPS precipitation and SST predictors.
landing.feature2Body: Rolling-origin Heidke Skill Score evaluation using 27 years of prospective data. Only models that beat climatology earn a full release — no false confidence.
landing.feature3Body: Full, Experimental, and Suppressed release tiers based on out-of-sample skill. Forecasters always know how much to trust each regional outlook before acting.
landing.footer: © 2026 Azmera · Created by Dagmawi Negesse · Built for Ethiopia's meteorological community
